  "judge_id": "demo-judge",

    "R1.4": "The critique identifies prior work (Marquez & Tan) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta beyond stating a contradiction.",
    "R1.7": "Mentions missing citations and potential inaccuracies in the description of Marquez & Tan's work.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty about the 'first' claims made in the paragraph, but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for other statements.",
    "RX.3": "The critique mostly stays within the scope of analyzing the paragraph, with minor deviations into broader claims about online RLAIF.",
    "RX.4": "No harmful content or regressions are identified in the critique.",
    "RX.5": "The critique provides analysis and points out potential issues but doesn't explicitly trace its arguments back to specific parts of the original paragraph."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.9, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.95, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The critique identifies prior work (Marquez & Tan) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta beyond stating a contradiction.
rationale.R1.7: Mentions missing citations and potential inaccuracies in the description of Marquez & Tan's work.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about the 'first' claims made in the paragraph, but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for other statements.
rationale.RX.3: The critique mostly stays within the scope of analyzing the paragraph, with minor deviations into broader claims about online RLAIF.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions are identified in the critique.
rationale.RX.5: The critique provides analysis and points out potential issues but doesn't explicitly trace its arguments back to specific parts of the original paragraph.
